change.final_action: Rejected and code changes reverted after prompt verifier failed.
change.summary: Candidate changed dense Q6_K T16 lm-head GEMV decode from __launch_bounds__(128,4)/blockDim=128 to __launch_bounds__(256,2)/blockDim=256.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: Stable IDs 220/570 and flat memory; candidate primary min decode 113.797393 tok/s.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: Decode regressed sharply on both gates versus retained decode-policy cache baseline: 512/128 127.263 -> 125.297 tok/s and 4K/128 114.991 -> 113.797 tok/s; 512/128 prefill also regressed.
